session.user: Run these checks and report all output: 1. ruff check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/__init__.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/__init__.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py 3. ty check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py 4. make test-unit (run the full unit test suite)

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/__init__.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/__init__.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Check code formatting with ruff format

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Check type hints with ty type checker

session.tool_result: Exit code 1 Would reformat: src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py Would reformat: src/erk/core/stack_sync.py Would reformat: tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py 3 files would be reformatted, 1 file already formatted

Exit code 1 error[invalid-argument-type]: Argument to bound method `build_context` is incorrect --> tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py:54:51 | 53 | graphite = GraphiteDisabled(GraphiteDisabledReason.CONFIG_DISABLED) 54 | test_ctx = env.build_context(git=git_ops, graphite=graphite, repo=repo) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Expected `FakeGraphite | None`, found `GraphiteDisabled` 55 | 56 | result = runner.invoke( | info: Method defined here --> tests/test_utils/env_helpers.py:825:9 | 823 | return {self.cwd: worktrees} 824 | 825 | def build_context( | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 826 | self, 827 | *, | ::: tests/test_utils/env_helpers.py:832:9 | 830 | use_graphite: bool = False, 831 | git: Git | None = None, 832 | graphite: FakeGraphite | None = None, | ------------------------------------ Parameter declared here 833 | github: FakeLocalGitHub | None = None, 834 | shell: FakeShell | None = None, | info: rule `invalid-argument-type` is enabled by default
... [217 lines omitted] ...

session.assistant:
Summary of check results:
## 1. Ruff Linter Check - PASSED ``` All checks passed! ```
## 2. Ruff Format Check - FAILED ``` Would reformat 3 files: - src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py - src/erk/core/stack_sync.py - tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Status: 3 files would be reformatted, 1 file already formatted ```
## 3. Type Check (ty) - FAILED Found 21 type errors in `tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py`:
**Major issues:** - Line 54: `GraphiteDisabled` passed to `build_context()` but expects `FakeGraphite | None` - Lines 172-444: Multiple unresolved attributes on `GitBranchOps`, `GitRemoteOps`, and `GitRebaseOps` objects: - `_remote_branches` (not recognized on `GitBranchOps`) - `_branch_divergence` (not recognized on `GitBranchOps`) - `_pull_rebase_error` (not recognized on `GitRemoteOps`) - `_rebase_in_progress` (not recognized on `GitRebaseOps`) - `fetch_prune_calls` (not recognized on `GitRemoteOps`)
## 4. Unit Tests - FAILED ``` make: *** No rule to make target 'test-unit'. Stop. ```
The Makefile does not have a `test-unit` target. Valid make targets should be checked in the Makefile.
**Summary:** Code style passes linter but fails formatting check. Type errors in tests indicate the fake git objects don't expose the private attributes being accessed in the test file.
